zh.lifeSummary: Llewelyn是Moreddig Warwyn Madog和wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Llewelyn是Moreddig Warwyn Madog和wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn

en.lifeSummary: Llewelyn was born as the son of Moreddig Warwyn Madog and wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Llewelyn est né, fils de Moreddig Warwyn Madog et wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Llewelyn wurde, als Sohn von Moreddig Warwyn Madog und wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Llewelyn è nato il come figlio di Moreddig Warwyn Madog e wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: LlewelynはMoreddig Warwyn Madogとwife Moreddig Warwyn Madogの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn(은)는 Moreddig Warwyn Madog(와)과 wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Llewelyn nasceu filho de Moreddig Warwyn Madog e wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Llewelyn родился. Его родителей звали Moreddig Warwyn Madog и wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Llewelyn nació como hijo de Moreddig Warwyn Madog y wife Moreddig Warwyn Madog. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
